finding: Boundary too narrow: success-toast-on-failure bug in dialog-manage-agents.tsx (3 call sites). saveCustomAgents() catches IPC errors internally and does NOT re-throw. After handleCreateAgent/handleEditAgent/handleConfirmDelete call saveCustomAgents(), they unconditionally fire success toasts even when the save failed. The plan's boundary excludes dialog-manage-agents.tsx (saying H-005 is already fixed), but this is a different bug directly related to AGENT-H-001 (toast timing). The plan's fix A4 won't help because the error path in saveCustomAgents swallows errors before they reach handleSave's catch block. Dialog closes via dialog.close() even on save failure.
repair_path: Either (1) make saveCustomAgents re-throw after its internal catch, then have handleSave's catch block show an error toast (not just console.error), or (2) expand boundary to also fix dialog-manage-agents.tsx: remove the unconditional success toast and let the error propagate to the child dialog. Fix all 3 call sites in dialog-manage-agents.tsx.

finding: Claim atom #1 (\"handleSave awaits props.onSave before dialog.close()\") is insufficient: when saveCustomAgents catches the IPC error internally and does not re-throw, handleSave's await resolves normally and dialog.close() still fires. The dialog closes even when the save failed. Claim atom should include: on IPC failure, keep dialog open so user can retry. The plan's catch block only uses console.error() — no user-visible error feedback. User sees dialog close and form data lost.
repair_path: Update handleSave catch block to NOT close dialog on error. Add error toast or keep dialog open with error message. Also add claim atom for \"dialog stays open on save failure, user can retry\".

finding: Plan claims cartographer found 5 findings (H-001 through H-005). Cartographer activity log shows findings_count=6. The 6th finding is unaccounted for. Without the cartography artifact, it's impossible to verify whether the plan misses a relevant finding. The prefab prompt was written with \"Expected Cartographer Findings\" which may differ from actual findings.
repair_path: Locate the missing 6th cartographer finding (check FI-029: \"setLoaded(true) called before async IPC load resolves\"). If it's in scope (loading state for initial agent list load), expand the plan to include it. If it's deferred to another lane, document the deferral explicitly.

finding: Claim atom #2 (locale-safe Number.replace) is inline in the component — untestable without mounting the full SolidJS component. Should extract a testable utility: `parseLocaleFloat(value: string): number` or similar. The plan acknowledges manual testing for this (\"enter 0,7 → verify parsed as 0.7\") but doesn't provide automated coverage.
repair_path: Extract parseLocaleSafeNumber() into a shared utility (e.g., packages/app/src/utils/parse.ts) or keep inline but add a unit test in packages/app/src/test/. The one-line replace is simple but the locale boundary is the exact kind of thing automation catches and humans forget.

finding: Hardcoded \"Saving...\" text in button JSX. Plan acknowledges this as \"transient UI state\" and \"not a translatable label.\" While reasonable-for-now, this creates a precedent. If the UI later needs i18n expansion for similar loading states across the app, this hardcoded string will need to be retrofitted. Consider adding a `language.t(\"common.saving\")` key now since the translation infrastructure already exists.
repair_path: Add a \"common.saving\" translation key to the language context (check where other keys live, likely packages/app/src/context/language.ts or similar locale JSON). Use language.t(\"common.saving\") instead of hardcoded \"Saving...\".

finding: Blocking: saveCustomAgents in dialog-manage-agents.tsx catches IPC errors internally and does NOT re-throw. All 3 call sites (handleCreateAgent, handleEditAgent, handleConfirmDelete) fire unconditional success toasts after await saveCustomAgents resolves — success toast fires even when IPC save failed. This is a pre-existing issue, not introduced by this plan, but affects the same user flow.
repair_path: Fix saveCustomAgents to re-throw after catch, OR restructure so child caller receives success/failure feedback. Defer to after plan execution since Lane 3 executor is also touching this same function.
